summary: The 3 audit fixes are correctly applied and verified. However, adversarial inspection uncovered 2 broken experiment-slug links on the Home page that the audit missed, and a self-referential link on Fenix Plus SA. These are real navigation defects that will produce 404s for users clicking from the Home page Lab preview.

header.detail: All 14 pages import Header from @/components/Header. Same primaryLinks from @/data/navigation.ts. ai-awakening page is an exception (uses AIAwakeningHero, no Header) but is not part of the 14 specified pages.

footer.detail: Footer rendered globally in root layout.tsx. Single source of truth. Contact page duplicate footer confirmed removed.

navigation.detail: All 7 primaryLinks resolve to existing routes. Header and Footer share the same navigation data source.

buttons_cta.detail: .cta-primary and .cta-secondary used on Home/Work/Capabilities/Approach/Lab. About and Contact use inline Tailwind (white-on-black CTA differs from purple .cta-primary). Product pages use per-product accent colors via inline styles. Audit rationale accepted.

cards_typography.detail: glass-panel rounded-2xl p-6, font-display, font-mono, .eyebrow, .section-title, .section-lede used consistently across all pages.

2_distinct_purpose_per_page.detail: All 14 pages serve distinct purposes. Home previews link to full pages — functional cross-referencing, not duplication. Product pages share structural template but have unique content, features, tech stacks, and use cases per product.

3_all_pages_exist.verdict: All 14 routes confirmed with source files

4_navigation_between_pages.verdict: 3 broken/misleading links found that the audit missed

issues.description: 2 of 5 Lab experiment preview links generate slugs that don't match the actual experiment slugs in lab/[slug]/page.tsx, producing 404 errors
issues.root_cause: Home page generates slugs via `exp.title.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-')` but lab/[slug] uses manually-defined slugs that differ from the title-to-slug algorithm.

issues.description: Self-referential link: the 'Project details' button links to /work/fenix-plus-sa — the current page itself. This is a no-op navigation.

links_verified_ok: All 7 primaryLinks in Header → valid routes
Product cross-links (CodexPilot→DocVault, Fenix→DocVault, Fenix→CodexPilot, 0Brain→CodexPilot, 0Brain→DocVault) — all valid
Lab index → lab/[slug] links — all valid

5_design_system_consistent.verdict: Design tokens and CSS variables used consistently across all 14 specified pages. ai-awakening page (15th route, not in scope) has hardcoded colors.

tokens_verified.typography: font-body (Inter), font-display (Inter weighted), font-mono (JetBrains Mono) — consistent
tokens_verified.glass_panels: .glass-panel and .glass-panel-strong — consistent borders, backgrounds, shadows, backdrop-blur

5_design_system_consistent.drift_detected: ai-awakening page (src/app/ai-awakening/page.tsx) uses hardcoded colors (#050505, #fff, #888, #666) instead of CSS variables, and lacks Header integration. This page is NOT part of the Phase 8 deliverable (it's route 15/15) but represents design system drift.

fix_1_duplicate_footer.detail: src/app/contact/page.tsx: no inline <footer> element present. Page relies on layout.tsx Footer like all other pages. Previous lines 262-269 cleanly removed.

fix_2_main_content_ids.additional_note: Pages that already had id="main-content" before the fix (Home, Work, Capabilities, Approach, Lab, Lab/[slug]) confirmed still in place.

fix_3_404_colors.description: 404 page hardcoded hex colors replaced with CSS variables

issues_found_beyond_audit.description: Home page Lab preview generates wrong slugs for 2 experiments: 'multi-format-document-understanding' (should be 'document-understanding-pipeline') and 'android-native-coding-agent' (should be 'android-coding-agent'). Both result in 404.
issues_found_beyond_audit.fix: Either change Home page experiment slugs to match lab/[slug] keys, or change lab/[slug] keys to match Home page. Also consider using the experiments data as a shared source rather than duplicating the list.

issues_found_beyond_audit.description: Fenix Plus SA page has a 'Project details' button that links to /work/fenix-plus-sa — the current page.
issues_found_beyond_audit.fix: Remove the button or change it to navigate somewhere useful (e.g. back to /work).

issues_found_beyond_audit.description: The ai-awakening page uses hardcoded colors (#050505, #fff, #888, #666) instead of CSS variables, and lacks id="main-content" on its <main> element.
issues_found_beyond_audit.fix: Replace hardcoded colors with var(--color-bg), var(--color-text), var(--color-muted), and add id="main-content". Note: this page is NOT part of the Phase 8 deliverable (15th route).

issues_found_beyond_audit.description: The 404 page (not-found.tsx) does not use <main id="main-content"> — it uses a plain <div> as root. The skip-to-content link in layout.tsx will have no target on 404 pages.
issues_found_beyond_audit.fix: Consider wrapping content in <main id="main-content"> or accept that 404 pages intentionally skip the shell.

correct_findings: Duplicate footer on Contact page — correctly identified and fixed
7 pages missing main-content IDs — correctly identified and fixed
404 hardcoded colors — correctly identified and fixed
missed_by_audit: 2 broken experiment-slug links on Home page (HIGH severity)
Self-referential link on Fenix Plus SA page (LOW severity)
ai-awakening page design system drift (LOW, out of scope)
audit_accuracy_assessment.audit_grade: B+ — correctly identified and fixed the 3 systemic issues, but missed 2 navigation bugs that will produce user-facing 404s
